questionHtml: Outline why the complex formed between Fe2+ and oxygen is red. Refer to the diagram above and section 17 of the data booklet.
markschemeHtml:
extensive conjugated system
OR
extensive delocalized bonding system
OR
extended system of alternating double and single bonds  [✔]

absorbs green
OR
complementary to red light  [✔]
